attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ECOS.SET_ID,                        
ECOS.SET_NAME,                      
ECOS.SET_TYPE,                      
ECOS.HEADER_ID,                     
ECOS.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID,              
ECOS.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID,                
ECOS.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,            
ECOS.SCHEDULE_ARRIVAL_DATE,         
ECOS.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE,          
ECOS.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE,          
ECOS.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,        
ECOS.SET_STATUS,                    
ECOS.CREATED_BY,                    
ECOS.CREATION_DATE,                 
ECOS.UPDATED_BY,                    
ECOS.UPDATE_DATE,                   
ECOS.UPDATE_LOGIN,                  
ECOS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,             
ECOS.ORDERED_QUANTITY_UOM,          
ECOS.LINE_TYPE_ID,                  
ECOS.SHIP_TOLERANCE_ABOVE,          
ECOS.SHIP_TOLERANCE_BELOW,          
ECOS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,            
ECOS.GLOBAL_NAME                   
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_OE_SETS ECOS
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_SETS SCOS WHERE SCOS.SET_ID = ECOS.SET_ID)

SELECT 
SCOS.SET_ID,                        
SCOS.SET_NAME,                      
SCOS.SET_TYPE,                      
SCOS.HEADER_ID,                     
SCOS.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID,              
SCOS.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID,                
SCOS.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE,            
SCOS.SCHEDULE_ARRIVAL_DATE,         
SCOS.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE,          
SCOS.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE,          
SCOS.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,        
SCOS.SET_STATUS,                    
SCOS.CREATED_BY,                    
SCOS.CREATION_DATE,                 
SCOS.UPDATED_BY,                    
SCOS.UPDATE_DATE,                   
SCOS.UPDATE_LOGIN,                  
SCOS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,             
SCOS.ORDERED_QUANTITY_UOM,          
SCOS.LINE_TYPE_ID,                  
SCOS.SHIP_TOLERANCE_ABOVE,          
SCOS.SHIP_TOLERANCE_BELOW,          
SCOS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,            
SCOS.GLOBAL_NAME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE                   
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_SETS SCOS
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT
1
FROM
$$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL COOLA,
$$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV_DAC  NSOLT 
WHERE
COOLA.SHIP_SET_ID = SCOS.SET_ID
AND
COOLA.HEADER_ID = SCOS.HEADER_ID
AND
NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = COOLA.LINE_ID 
AND
NSOLT.SS_CODE = 'CG'
)

SELECT
DT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
DT.LINE_ID,
DT.SS_CODE,
DT.SET_ID,
DT.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
DT.HEADER_ID,
DT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
FROM
(SELECT
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT LINE_ID,
NSOLT.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
SCOS.SET_ID SET_ID,
CAST(SCOS.SET_NAME AS INTEGER) SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
SCOS.HEADER_ID  HEADER_ID,
SCOS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_SETS SCOS
INNER JOIN 
$$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL COOLA 
ON
COOLA.SHIP_SET_ID = SCOS.SET_ID
AND
COOLA.HEADER_ID = SCOS.HEADER_ID
INNER JOIN
$$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV_DAC  NSOLT
ON
NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = COOLA.LINE_ID 
AND
NSOLT.SS_CODE = 'CG'
) DT
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY DT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ORDER BY DT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC)=1
